title: taraxacum latissimum
intro: Taraxacum latissimum, also known as the broad-leaved dandelion, is a perennial plant species within the dandelion family, characterized by its broad leaves and yellow flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Taraxacum latissimum include its ability to support liver function, reduce blood pressure, and act as a diuretic to remove excess fluids from the body. Taraxacum latissimum can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, making it a versatile herbal remedy for various health conditions.
